decisions.decision: Shared pure resolver in src/core/utils/specDisplayName.ts with optional heading param
decisions.why: Both sidebar and viewer call one rule so they cannot drift; heading param keeps FR-002 order (recorded > heading > slug) without file I/O
decisions.rejected: Duplicating the fallback logic in each surface

implement.summary: Sidebar rows and viewer header now render a readable spec name via one shared resolver; slug stays the identifier
